creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
marcus      2009-07-04 19:36:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/policykit-gnome Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/policykit-gnome/files 
                                   patch-polkit-gnome_polkit-gnome-action.c 
  Log:
  Commit a patch from Ubuntu to fix a bug which can occur when trying to
  modify policies as a non-root user.  PK worked fine for me without this,
  but apparently some users require this.
  
  PR:             136328
  Submitted by:   Gustau PÃ©rez <gustau.perez@gmail.com>
